The quantity of rainfall should be determined with the help of
a gauge whose diameter is one cubit. When this vessel contains 50
Palas, it will measure one Adhaka.
[According to Parasara quoted under XXI.32 an Adhaka=
17600/7 cubic AAgulas. Wc have already seen that an Adhaka is
X/4 Drona.
Cf. the
This statement of our author proves the great advance made by
Magadha in trade and culture. Hence the weights and measures
used in Magadha must have become famous throughout India.]
